sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُؤَذِّنُ يَصْعَدُ إِلَى الْمَأْذَنَةِ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Mujezin je penjao na minaret pet puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: The muezzin used to climb to the minaret five times a day.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُنَادِي النَّاسَ لِلصَّلَاةِ بِصَوْتٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Pozivao je ljude na molitvu lijepim glasom.
sentences.translationEn: He would call the people to prayer with a beautiful voice.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ النَّاسُ الأَذَانَ وَتَوَقَّفُوا عَنِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su čuli ezan i prestajali s radom.
sentences.translationEn: The people heard the call to prayer and stopped their work.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَذَانُ يُنَظِّمُ وَقْتَ الْيَوْمِ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Ezan je uređivao dnevno vrijeme za sve.
sentences.translationEn: The call to prayer organised the time of day for everyone.
